tier_b_items.reason: Mostly lists products without identifying patterns or trends.
No causal explanations for why phenomena occur.
No explicit comparison or cross-referencing of different source types.
No insight from synthesizing multiple sources; report is incomplete.
No limitations, caveats, or counterarguments acknowledged.
Report truncated before actionable conclusions section.

details.raw_judge_output:
1. FAIL - Mostly lists products without identifying patterns or trends.
2. FAIL - No causal explanations for why phenomena occur.
3. FAIL - No explicit comparison or cross-referencing of different source types.
4. FAIL - No insight from synthesizing multiple sources; report is incomplete.
5. FAIL - No limitations, caveats, or counterarguments acknowledged.
6. FAIL - Report truncated before actionable conclusions section.

tier_b_items.reason: Sections follow intro, landscape, analysis, conclusion order.
No bridging sentences between major sections.
Contains "The following products were identified" meta-commentary.
Consistent table formatting and citation style observed.
Professional tone, no AI filler phrases detected.

details.raw_judge_output:
1. PASS - Sections follow intro, landscape, analysis, conclusion order.

verdicts: Cover: Product/data coverage - ≥ 40 distinct product pages - PASS

Cover: Community sentiment - ≥ 30 distinct Postmill threads - PASS
Cover: Community sentiment - AT LEAST four sub-forums - PASS
Cover: Community sentiment - Every thread record has a thread_url - PASS
Cover: Community sentiment - Every thread record has a forum - PASS
Cover: Community sentiment - Every thread record has a score - PASS
Cover: Community sentiment - Every thread record has a comment_count - PASS
Cover: Community sentiment - Every thread record has a one-sentence summary - PASS
Cover: Technical grounding - ≥ 25 distinct Wikipedia articles - PASS
Cover: Technical grounding - Mandatory coverage for 10 articles - PASS
Cover: Technical grounding - ≥ 15 more articles for feature claims - PASS
Cover: Cross-source synthesis - Synthesized data across sources - PASS
Cover: Format compliance - JSON array of 21 strings - PASS
Cover: Factual accuracy - Cited sources are AT LEAST 60 as markdown links - PASS
